title: maxillaria neillii
intro: Maxillaria neillii is a species of orchid, also known as a type of epiphytic orchid, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Maxillaria neillii are said to include the relief of pain and inflammation, as well as the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
